Class HarmonicOscillator1D

Namespace
QuantumWaves.Solutions
Assembly
QuantumLibrary.dll

Provides solutions for the one dimensional quantum harmonic oscillator.

public static class HarmonicOscillator1D
Inheritance
object
HarmonicOscillator1D
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)

object.ToString()

Methods

Energy(int, float, float)

Computes the energy of the nth harmonic oscillator state.

public static float Energy(int n, float omega, float hBar = 1)

Parameters

n int

Quantum number (must be non-negative).

omega float

Angular frequency (must be greater than zero).

hBar float

Reduced Planck constant (must be greater than zero).

Returns

float

The energy value.

Exceptions

ArgumentOutOfRangeException

Thrown if n is negative, or if omega or hBar is less than or equal to zero.

State(int, float, float, float)

Creates the nth energy eigenstate.

public static SeparableWaveFunction1D State(int n, float mass, float omega, float hBar = 1)

Parameters

n int

Quantum number (must be non-negative).

mass float

Particle mass (must be greater than zero).

omega float

Angular frequency (must be greater than zero).

hBar float

Reduced Planck constant (must be greater than zero).

Returns

SeparableWaveFunction1D

A separable wave function representing the state.

Exceptions

ArgumentOutOfRangeException

Thrown if n is invalid, or if mass, omega, or hBar is less than or equal to zero.
